intro: A beautiful life sim sandbox RPG from veterans of the Fable series.
description:
Embark on a lifetime of adventure in a beautiful world of creativity and intrigue. Raise a family, customise your farm, run a business, craft items, and battle monsters!

Your actions and decisions matter in our adventurous story filled with purpose and promise. Lend a helping hand to villagers in need and discover the unique blend of creativity and choice that sets Kynseed apart. Come and join us - your legacy awaits!

• Story-driven RPG set in beautiful regions, where you’ll battle dark faery tale creatures.
• Customise your farm and farmhouse using Kynseed's customisation mode with hundreds of items and limitless design possibilities.
• Take on the role of shopkeeper and run your own blacksmith, potion shop, tavern, or bustling goods store.
• Develop relationships with villagers who will remember your deeds, actions, and pranks!
• Combat the evil Hob army as they construct powerful totems and cause the destruction of crops and buildings.
• Rebuild broken houses and buildings for your neighbours and new NPCs.
• Gather materials to create items, forge weapons or mix cures for bizarre maladies.
• Buy strange artifacts from the mysterious Mr. Fairweather — items that ease your chores, boost your combat skills, or simply let you bend the rules of the world. But beware his life tax: each one costs years from your life.
• A world where everyone ages -  raise a family then step into your children's shoes and continue your legacy.

In Kynseed, live your life the way you choose in a lovingly handcrafted 2D open world.
